This is something that's been in the marketing fold for decades and decades, way before the internet was even made, which is the ADA funnel, attention, interest, desire and action. I can't tell you how simple this is because it ties into the 5W avatar. So the first part of ADA is attention. So the big bold statement, reach for their problem or opportunity. The first two lines in your copy matter, and, you know, this will depend on the ad format you're playing with, but for example, in the news feed, if you can't hook them on the image in the first two lines, the rest of it doesn't matter. Then comes the interest stage. So you've got them hooked, now keep them. Build a bridge story from problem to solution.
